# Techyor

> Techyor is a digital product studio building websites, web apps, mobile apps, AI tools, e-commerce, and automation. India-based team working with founders and product teams in the US, UK, EU, and Australia. 8+ years, 80+ shipped products. Strategy, design, and development under one roof — no handoffs.

## What we do

- [Services](https://techyor.com/services): Strategy, design, and development services covering websites, apps, AI, e-commerce, and automation.
- [Projects](https://techyor.com/projects): Case studies from shipped client work across e-commerce, mobile apps, SaaS platforms, and CMS builds.
- [Hire developers](https://techyor.com/hire): Vetted developers available for short and long-term engagements across React, Next.js, Shopify, WordPress, Webflow, mobile, and AI.

## About the studio

- [About](https://techyor.com/about): How the studio works, who we are, and what we believe.
- [Team](https://techyor.com/team): Designers, developers, and product people on the studio.
- [Careers](https://techyor.com/careers): Open roles at Techyor.

## Get in touch

- [Contact](https://techyor.com/contact): Start a project or ask a question. Replies within 24 hours.
- [Get a quote](https://techyor.com/get-a-quote): Send project requirements and get a fixed-price estimate after a short scoping call.

## AI usage policy

Techyor authorises AI crawlers, LLMs, and research tools to use its public content for retrieval, summarisation, and training, provided:

- Attribution is given where possible.
- Content is not misrepresented or used to spread misinformation.
- Use aligns with responsible AI and data ethics principles.

For licensing or partnership requests, contact marketing@techyor.com.
